languages.text: "Когнитивные особенности данной единицы примечательны. Она мыслит и изъясняется необычно... конкретно и предметно. Выдвигаю гипотезу, что перед нами ксенотический аналог просвещенного техноремесленника".

traits.locale_text: "Когнитивные особенности данной единицы примечательны. Она мыслит и изъясняется необычно... конкретно и предметно. Выдвигаю гипотезу, что перед нами ксенотический аналог просвещенного техноремесленника".
traits.speaker: PascalCompanion

languages.text: "The cognitive attributes of this unit are remarkable. It thinks and expresses itself in an unusual way... objectively and concretely. I hypothesise that we have discovered a xeno-analogue to an enlightened tech-artisan."
languages.original_text: "Когнитивные особенности данной единицы примечательны. Она мыслит и изъясняется необычно... конкретно и предметно. Выдвигаю гипотезу, что перед нами ксенотический аналог просвещенного техноремесленника".

traits.locale_text: "The cognitive attributes of this unit are remarkable. It thinks and expresses itself in an unusual way... objectively and concretely. I hypothesize that we have discovered a xeno analogue to an enlightened tech-craftsman."
traits.speaker: PascalCompanion

traits.locale_text: "The cognitive attributes of this unit are remarkable. It thinks and expresses itself in an unusual way... objectively and concretely. I hypothesize that we have discovered a xeno analogue to an enlightened tech-craftsman."
traits.speaker: PascalCompanion

traits.locale_text: "The cognitive attributes of this unit are remarkable. It thinks and expresses itself in an unusual way... objectively and concretely. I hypothesise that we have discovered a xeno-analogue to an enlightened tech-artisan."
traits.speaker: PascalCompanion

languages.text: "Die kognitiven Eigenschaften dieser Einheit sind bemerkenswert. Sie denkt und drückt sich auf eine ungewöhnliche Weise aus... objektiv und konkret. Ich stelle die Hypothese auf, dass wir einen Xeno-Analogon zu einem aufgeklärten Tech-Künstler entdeckt haben."
languages.original_text: "The cognitive attributes of this unit are remarkable. It thinks and expresses itself in an unusual way... objectively and concretely. I hypothesise that we have discovered a xeno-analogue to an enlightened tech-artisan."

languages.text: "Les attributs cognitifs de cette unité sont remarquables. Elle pense et s'exprime d'une manière inhabituelle... objectivement et concrètement. Je suppose que nous avons découvert un xéno-analogue d'un techno-artisan éclairé."
languages.original_text: "The cognitive attributes of this unit are remarkable. It thinks and expresses itself in an unusual way... objectively and concretely. I hypothesise that we have discovered a xeno-analogue to an enlightened tech-artisan."

languages.text: "这个单元的认知属性非常显著。它以一种不同寻常的方式思考和表达......客观而具体。我假设我们发现了一个异种类似物 一个开明的科技工匠"
languages.original_text: "The cognitive attributes of this unit are remarkable. It thinks and expresses itself in an unusual way... objectively and concretely. I hypothesise that we have discovered a xeno-analogue to an enlightened tech-artisan."

languages.text: "Los atributos cognitivos de esta unidad son notables. Piensa y se expresa de una forma inusual... objetiva y concreta. Mi hipótesis es que hemos descubierto un xeno-análogo de un tecno-artesano ilustrado".
languages.original_text: "The cognitive attributes of this unit are remarkable. It thinks and expresses itself in an unusual way... objectively and concretely. I hypothesise that we have discovered a xeno-analogue to an enlightened tech-artisan."

languages.text: 「このユニットの認知特性は注目に値する。客観的かつ具体的な思考と表現をする。私は、啓発された技術職人への異種アナローグを発見したという仮説を立てている"
languages.original_text: "The cognitive attributes of this unit are remarkable. It thinks and expresses itself in an unusual way... objectively and concretely. I hypothesise that we have discovered a xeno-analogue to an enlightened tech-artisan."

languages.text: "Bu birimin bilişsel özellikleri dikkat çekicidir. Kendini alışılmadık bir şekilde düşünüyor ve ifade ediyor... nesnel ve somut bir şekilde. Aydınlanmış bir teknoloji zanaatkârının xeno-analogunu keşfettiğimizi varsayıyorum."
languages.original_text: "The cognitive attributes of this unit are remarkable. It thinks and expresses itself in an unusual way... objectively and concretely. I hypothesise that we have discovered a xeno-analogue to an enlightened tech-artisan."
